query: SELECT id, item, domain, milestone FROM topic_criteria WHERE item LIKE '%anatomia%' OR item LIKE '%identifica%' OR item LIKE '%anomalia%' OR item LIKE '%conhecimento%' OR item LIKE '%nervos%' ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kpmXQEhQh9QUB5.9201f3ecb012 --database dyAwmFLrC4fePdcS2zLLQv --execute SELECT id, item, domain, milestone FROM topic_criteria WHERE item LIKE '%anatomia%' OR item LIKE '%identifica%' OR item LIKE '%anomalia%' OR item LIKE '%conhecimento%' OR item LIKE '%nervos%' ORDER BY id;
